picks.quote: Dustin Porier is not only going to win this fight, but he's going to knock Max Holloway out
Amanda the Hebos... I'm a little bit biased. She's been lock of the week four times... maybe we give her an opportunity to earn that right back.
Anthony Smith. Now, he should be the better striker in this fight... Balton's got the power and I think he can land that power.
I'm considering him as kind of this the mediocre play for Lock of the Week... RDA submits Whitaker in the third round
